name: Profile_R5_ArtifactAssessment_R4
title: Cross-version Profile for R5.ArtifactAssessment resource for use in FHIR R4
description: This cross-version profile allows R5 ArtifactAssessment resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 Basic resources.

element.short: Cross-version Profile for R5.ArtifactAssessment resource for use in FHIR R4
element.definition: This cross-version profile allows R5 ArtifactAssessment resource content to be represented via FHIR R4 Basic resources.

element.short: R5: A short title for the assessment for use in displaying and selecting (new)
element.comment:
Element `ArtifactAssessment.title` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ArtifactAssessment` is not mapped.
Element `ArtifactAssessment.title` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: How to cite the comment or rating (new)
element.comment:
Element `ArtifactAssessment.citeAs[x]` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ArtifactAssessment` is not mapped.
Element `ArtifactAssessment.citeAs[x]` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

Element `ArtifactAssessment.date` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ArtifactAssessment` is not mapped.
Element `ArtifactAssessment.date` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
The date is often not tracked until the resource is published, but may be present on draft content. Note that this is not the same as the resource last-modified-date, since the resource may be a secondary representation of the artifact assessment. Additional specific dates may be added as extensions or be found by consulting Provenances associated with past versions of the resource.

Element `ArtifactAssessment.copyright` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ArtifactAssessment` is not mapped.
Element `ArtifactAssessment.copyright` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: When the artifact assessment was approved by publisher (new)
element.comment:
Element `ArtifactAssessment.approvalDate` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ArtifactAssessment` is not mapped.
Element `ArtifactAssessment.approvalDate` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
The 'date' element may be more recent than the approval date because of minor changes or editorial corrections.

element.short: R5: When the artifact assessment was last reviewed by the publisher (new)
element.comment:
Element `ArtifactAssessment.lastReviewDate` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ArtifactAssessment` is not mapped.
Element `ArtifactAssessment.lastReviewDate` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
If specified, this date follows the original approval date.

element.short: R5: The artifact assessed, commented upon or rated (new)
element.comment:
Element `ArtifactAssessment.artifact[x]` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ArtifactAssessment` is not mapped.
Element `ArtifactAssessment.artifact[x]` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Comment, classifier, or rating content (new)
element.comment:
Element `ArtifactAssessment.content` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ArtifactAssessment` is not mapped.
Element `ArtifactAssessment.content` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: submitted | triaged | waiting-for-input | resolved-no-change | resolved-change-required | deferred | duplicate | applied | published | entered-in-error (new)
element.comment:
Element `ArtifactAssessment.workflowStatus` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ArtifactAssessment` is not mapped.

element.comment:
